title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 42
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost scarf.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your scarf? You sounded worried this morning. || Woman: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the library, because I remembered taking it off while I read. || Man: And did you check the café? You were there later. || Woman: I did, but it was not there. Then my sister called and said [1]my scarf was on the back seat of Dad's car[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Man: Good. You would need it today. || Woman: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find your scarf? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the library, because I remembered taking it off while I read.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And did you check the café? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my sister called and said my scarf was on the back seat of Dad's car. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the scarf?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, scarf on a library chair, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, scarf on the back seat of a car, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, scarf beside a café cup, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my scarf was on the back seat of Dad's car.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to play tennis this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Boy: I don't think so. The courts are still wet, so that plan will not work. || Girl: We could go swimming instead. || Boy: I checked, but the pool closes early. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are going to a board game café after school[/1]. || Girl: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Boy: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.text: Are we still going to play tennis this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The courts are still wet, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but the pool closes early. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are going to a board game café after school.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the farm visit.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What do we need to take for the farm visit tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Girl: The teacher said we do not need to bring trainers, because they have enough for everybody. || Boy: What about a camera? || Girl: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring gloves because we will help move small boxes outside[/1]. || Boy: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Girl: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Girl: I first thought about pasta, but the sauce is too spicy. || Woman: The fish and chips looks good too. || Girl: Maybe, but it takes twenty minutes. I think [1]I will have the vegetable curry because it is ready now[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I will order after you. || Girl: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the homework help group.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the homework help group today. Please do not go to the library, because all tables are booked. Some students may wait by the computer room, but the computers are being repaired. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the room twelve after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the homework help group today. Please do not go to the library, because all tables are booked. Some students may wait by the computer room, but the computers are being repaired. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the room twelve after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the sports centre tomorrow? I thought you were going to cycle. || Boy: I was, but my bike light is broken. || Man: Could you use the taxi instead? || Boy: I checked, but it costs too much. [1]I am going to take the bus because it stops outside the main door[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Boy: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the café this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to wash the floor. || Man: Not now, because it is still wet. || Woman: So will you serve outside tables? || Man: No, the weather is too windy. The manager said [1]my job today is to make sandwiches in the kitchen[/1]. || Woman: That sounds clear enough. || Man: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
